name: ExtensionMeasureReport_DataUpdateType
title: R5: incremental | snapshot (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `MeasureReport.dataUpdateType` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`MeasureReport.dataUpdateType` 0..1 `code`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `MeasureReport.dataUpdateType` 0..1 `code`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `MeasureReport.dataUpdateType` has a context of MeasureReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.dataUpdateType` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.comment:
Element `MeasureReport.dataUpdateType` has a context of MeasureReport based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `MeasureReport`.
Element `MeasureReport.dataUpdateType` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This element only applies to Data-collection reports used to communicate the data-of-interest for a measure
element.isModifierReason: This element determines whether the data in a data-exchange measure report is a snapshot or incremental update and is required in order to correctly apply the data update to a receiving system

element.definition: Indicates whether the data submitted in a data-exchange report represents a snapshot or incremental update. A snapshot update replaces all previously submitted data for the receiver, whereas an incremental update represents only updated and/or changed data and should be applied as a differential update to the existing submitted data for the receiver.
element.comment: This element only applies to Data-collection reports used to communicate the data-of-interest for a measure
